seoTitle: Warruwi vs Warumungu — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Warruwi and Warumungu. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Warruwi and Warumungu.
heading: Warruwi vs Warumungu — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Warruwi, Northern Territory and Warumungu, Northern Territory. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Warruwi and Warumungu have similar overall climate risk scores.

faq.question: Is Warruwi or Warumungu safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Warruwi has a flood risk score of 52/100, while Warumungu scores 36/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Warruwi scores 35/100 for bushfire risk. Warumungu scores 60/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Warruwi or Warumungu?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Warruwi has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area face minimal climate value impact based on current projections.
